prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Crystal structure of mouse DXO in complex with pGGGUU RNA and two magnesium ions. Entity description: Decapping and exoribonuclease protein. Entry keywords: HYDROLASE/RNA dxo, RNA, decapping, exoribonuclease, HYDROLASE, HYDROLASE-RNA complex. Polymer composition: protein/NA. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.380353; mean_interface=0.260237; max_segment_membrane_density=0.715608; mean_disorder=0.222866. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
V68 E65 cofactor sentinel source. cofactor_context ligand_context cofactor-stabilized soluble core; components: MG. Not assembly_required_core and no explicit transmembrane topology evidence.
